2604.14895.title: Beyond Importance Sampling: Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization
2604.14895.paper_summary: We propose a new perspective on policy optimization: rather than reweighting all samples by their importance ratios, an optimizer should select which samples are trustworthy enough to drive a policy update. Building on this view, we introduce Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization (RGPO), which replaces the importance sampling ratio r_theta = pi_theta / pi_old with a smooth, differentiable acceptance gate alpha_theta(s, a) = g(r_theta(s, a)) in the range [0, 1]. Unlike prior work that applies rejection sampling as a data-level heuristic before training, RGPO elevates rejection to an optimization principle: the gate participates directly in gradient computation and is implicitly updated alongside the policy. RGPO provides a unified framework: the policy gradients of TRPO, PPO, and REINFORCE all correspond to specific choices of the effective gradient weight w(r) = g'(r) * r. We prove that RGPO guarantees finite, bounded gradient variance even when importance sampling ratios are heavy-tailed (where IS variance diverges). We further show that RGPO incurs only a bounded, controllable bias and provides an approximate monotonic policy improvement guarantee analogous to TRPO. RGPO matches PPO in computational cost, requires no second-order optimization, and extends naturally to RLHF-style preference alignment. In online preference fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct on Anthropic HH-RLHF (n = 3 seeds), RGPO uses a dual-ratio gate that anchors learning to both the previous policy and the reference model, achieving a Pareto-dominant outcome: the highest reward among online RL methods (+14.8% vs. PPO-RLHF) and the lowest KL divergence to the reference model (-16.0% vs. PPO-RLHF, -53.1% vs. GRPO).
2604.14895.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種關於政策優化的新視角：優化器應該選擇哪些樣本足夠可信以推動政策更新，而不是通過其重要性比率重新加權所有樣本。在這一觀點的基礎上，我們引入了拒絕門控政策優化（RGPO），它用一個平滑、可微的接受門 alpha_theta(s, a) = g(r_theta(s, a)) 來替代重要性抽樣比率 r_theta = pi_theta / pi_old，範圍在 [0, 1] 之內。與之前的工作不同，RGPO 將拒絕提升為一種優化原則：該門直接參與梯度計算，並與政策一起隱式更新。RGPO 提供了一個統一的框架：TRPO、PPO 和 REINFORCE 的政策梯度都對應於有效梯度權重 w(r) = g'(r) * r 的特定選擇。我們證明了 RGPO 保證有限的、有界的梯度方差，即使在重要性抽樣比率為重尾的情況下（在這種情況下 IS 方差會發散）。我們進一步顯示 RGPO 只會產生有限的、可控的偏差，並提供類似於 TRPO 的近似單調政策改進保證。RGPO 在計算成本上與 PPO 相匹配，無需二階優化，並自然擴展到 RLHF 風格的偏好對齊。在 Anthropic HH-RLHF 上對 Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct 的在線偏好微調中（n = 3 個種子），RGPO 使用一個雙比率門，將學習固定於先前的政策和參考模型，實現了帕累托優越的結果：在線 RL 方法中獲得最高的獎勵（比 PPO-RLHF 高出 +14.8%）以及與參考模型的最低 KL 散度（比 PPO-RLHF 低 -16.0%，比 GRPO 低 -53.1%）。
2604.14895.author: Ziwu Sun et.al.
2604.14895.authors: Ziwu Sun, Zhen Gao, Jiyong Zhang, Jiaheng Li
